news.summary:
Southeast Asia is set to see a warmer-than-usual early summer, potentially raising power demand for fuel and straining grids at a time when the Middle East conflict has tightened energy supplies in the region.

news.headline: Alleged Bondi gunman seeks order to suppress family's identity
news.summary: Naveed Akram is seeking to prevent media publishing details about his mother, sister and brother.

news.headline: UAE releases video of Iranian drone interception
news.summary: The UAE’s Ministry of Defence released video it says shows Iranian drones being intercepted and destroyed.

news.headline: Video shows apparent US strike as Trump blames Iran for school massacre
news.summary:
New video from Iranian state media shows a missile slamming into a compound in southern Iran, as evidence mounted that the US military was most likely responsible for the February 28 attack on a girls’ school that left more than 160 dead, mostly children.
